entries.label: site_create_modal
translation_notes: Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with size='wide' variant via className
Local useState form object → useForm (react-hook-form) + zodResolver with Site zod schema
Stepper primitive → shadcn Steps or custom stepper using cn() utility with completed Set
Checkbox-based module toggles → Controller-wrapped Checkbox components from shadcn
User table in step 4 → shadcn Table with RadioGroup for primary selection and Checkbox for assign
Add Server Action `createSite` / `updateSite` with RBAC guard (Admin only) and outbox event
Hardcoded country/timezone lists → pull from shared reference data table or next-intl keys
canNext validation → zod schema trigger per-step using form.trigger(['code','name'])

entries.label: ist_cancel_modal
translation_notes: Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog, size='default'
Danger confirm button disabled until reason selected → shadcn Button with disabled prop bound to zod validation
Alert amber box → shadcn Alert with AlertTriangle icon from lucide-react
Select reason → shadcn Select component with Controller from react-hook-form
Server Action `cancelIST(id, reason, notes)` with state-machine guard (must not be closed/cancelled)
Emits outbox event to release hard-locked LPs back to available status
Hardcoded reason list → database-driven enum or next-intl i18n keys

entries.label: ist_amend_modal
translation_notes: Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Date inputs → shadcn Calendar / DatePicker (Popover + Calendar) with Controller
Number input for freight cost → shadcn Input type='number' with min/step props
Info alert about approval reset on date change → shadcn Alert with InfoIcon
Server Action `amendIST(id, patch)` must re-trigger from-site approval when ship_date changes
Cost allocation select → shadcn Select with Controller
Add field-level RLS guard: only draft/planned ISTs are amendable

entries.label: replication_retry_modal
translation_notes: Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog
Dynamic title/description based on scope prop → computed from Server Component data or passed as prop
Priority select → shadcn Select with Controller, maps to queue priority field
Entity badges → shadcn Badge component with variant='secondary'
Server Action `retryReplicationJobs(scope, priority)` enqueues jobs in background worker
Target sites list → fetched from active sites query, not hardcoded filter
Scope variants (failed/all/single) → discriminated union type in zod schema

entries.label: conflict_resolve_modal
translation_notes: Wide modal with diff table → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with max-w-4xl class override
Radio per field row (source vs site) → RadioGroup with RadioGroupItem per diff field
Bulk 'Choose All Source/Site' buttons → single click handler updating all radio values in useForm
Reason select (required before submit) → shadcn Select with Controller + zod .min(1) guard
E-signature password gate → conditional shadcn Input type='password', wired to Server Action re-auth check
Apply Resolution → Server Action `resolveConflict(entityId, siteId, fieldChoices, reason, esig)` writes audit log
Hardcoded conflict data → Drizzle query for conflict record, passed as Server Component prop
Known bug BL-MS-02: e-signature gate rendered but not wired — must implement before production
known_bugs: BL-MS-02: E-signature gate on conflict resolve rendered but not functionally wired (spec §9.2)

entries.label: lane_create_modal
translation_notes: Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog, size='default'
Dual-use create/edit pattern via isEdit flag → single form with useForm defaultValues loaded from lane prop
From/To site selects → shadcn Select sourced from active sites query (Server Component)
Checkbox flags (HAZMAT, cold chain, customs, active) → shadcn Checkbox with Controller
Comma-separated carriers input → shadcn Input, parsed server-side to string[]
Server Action `createLane` / `updateLane` with Admin RBAC guard
Hardcoded site list → Drizzle query for active sites
Add outbox event on lane create/update for downstream config propagation

entries.label: rate_card_upload_modal
translation_notes: 4-step import wizard → Stepper + conditional step render, same pattern as SiteCreateModal
Drag-and-drop file zone → shadcn or @radix-ui DropZone, wired to useDropzone (react-dropzone)
Column mapping step → shadcn Table with Select in each row for field mapping
Preview step (first 5 rows) → shadcn Table showing parsed CSV rows from Server Action parse call
Confirm Summary → shadcn Card with labeled key/value pairs (Summary primitive)
File upload → multipart Server Action, parse CSV server-side with papaparse, return preview rows
Validate file size (max 5MB) and type (csv/xlsx) in Server Action before processing
Import result → background job with progress websocket or polling; show toast on complete

entries.label: site_config_override_modal
translation_notes: Dynamic field rendering based on selected key → conditional shadcn Select or Input per key type
Setting key select → shadcn Select drives conditional rendering of Override Value field
L1 base value display → read-only Card section, sourced from org config query
Effective From date → shadcn DatePicker (Popover + Calendar)
Server Action `upsertSiteConfigOverride(siteId, key, value, effectiveFrom, notes)` with Admin/SiteManager guard
Setting key list → database-driven enum or config schema, not hardcoded
Add audit log entry on every override change
Known pattern: key→value type mapping table needed in DB schema (string, select, number per key)

entries.label: permission_bulk_assign_modal
translation_notes: Tabbed single/bulk mode → shadcn Tabs + TabsList + TabsContent
Single assignment tab: user + site + role selects → shadcn Select with Controller for each
Primary site checkbox → shadcn Checkbox with Controller
Bulk CSV tab: drop zone → react-dropzone wired to multipart Server Action
CSV bulk path: upload → column mapping → preview → confirm (same wizard pattern as rate card upload)
Server Action `assignUserToSite(userId, siteId, role, isPrimary)` with Admin RBAC guard
Bulk Server Action `bulkAssignUsersFromCSV(file)` validates emails, site codes, roles before applying
Hardcoded role list → roles enum from DB or next-intl keys

entries.label: site_decommission_modal
translation_notes: Destructive type-to-confirm pattern → shadcn Input with value compared to site code, disables confirm Button
Impact summary table (users, WOs, ISTs, holds) → shadcn Table, rows colored red/green via cn() utility
Pre-conditions checklist with actionable links → shadcn Alert list, each item conditionally red/green
Server Action `decommissionSite(siteId, confirmCode)` requires Admin role and all pre-conditions clear
Pre-condition checks → Drizzle queries for open WOs, in-transit ISTs, quality holds, unassigned users
dismissible=false → Dialog not closeable via Escape/overlay-click (use onInteractOutside prevention)
On success: archive all site data, revoke user access, emit audit event with 7-year retention tag
Hardcoded color logic → Tailwind conditional classes via cn() — no inline style

entries.label: activation_confirm_modal
translation_notes: Modal wrapper → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with dismissible=false (prevent outside close)
Summary rows (tables affected, users, sites, duration) → shadcn Card with labeled dl/dt/dd pairs
Progress indicator (simulated) → shadcn Progress component or shadcn Skeleton rows while running
Server Action `activateMultiSite()` applies RLS policies to 20 tables, takes 30-60s → background job
Use optimistic UI + polling or server-sent events to show progress of RLS application
Confirm button → triggers activation job and enters loading state with spinner
Emit activation_completed audit event on success, activation_failed on error with rollback option
dismissible=false → onInteractOutside e.preventDefault() on DialogContent

entries.label: rollback_confirm_modal
translation_notes: Type-to-confirm 'ROLLBACK' pattern → shadcn Input, compare value === 'ROLLBACK' to enable Button
Danger alert → shadcn Alert with variant='destructive' and AlertTriangle icon
dismissible=false → onInteractOutside e.preventDefault() on DialogContent
Server Action `rollbackToSingleSite()` reverts RLS policies, only allowed from dual_run state
State machine guard: check activationState === 'dual_run' in Server Action before proceeding
Hardcoded state machine documentation → derive from DB activationState field
Emit rollback_completed audit event, notify all site managers via notification outbox

entries.label: promote_env_modal
translation_notes: L1→L2→L3 env ladder visualization → custom CSS flex layout or shadcn Card sequence with connecting arrows
Target scope select (site or line depending on level) → shadcn Select, options driven by level prop
Multi-select keys to promote → shadcn Command + Badge pattern or native select[multiple] with shadcn styling
ReasonInput with minLength → shadcn Textarea + zod .min(10) validation via zodResolver
Server Action `promoteConfigKeys(level, targetScope, keys, reason)` with Admin guard
Level prop determines scope options: L2 → sites, L3 → lines (future)
Hardcoded key options → query from org config schema table for available promotable keys
Emit config_promoted audit event with old/new value diff per key

entries.label: ms_dashboard
translation_notes: KPI strip (5 cards) → shadcn Card array with role-gated value display using session RBAC check
Network tree view (L0→L3) → custom TreeView component using shadcn Collapsible, or react-arborist
Map View stub → placeholder Card with 'P2 feature' note; real impl uses react-leaflet or mapbox-gl (BL-MS-01)
Alerts strip with dismiss → shadcn Alert array, dismissed state persisted in user preferences DB column
Active Transfers feed → shadcn ScrollArea + timeline items, data from Drizzle IST query filtered to active statuses
Replication Health mini-panel → three numeric KPI divs, data from replication_jobs aggregate query
Site Status widget → list with StatusDot per site, last_seen from site_heartbeat table
Auto-refresh 60s → SWR or React Query with refreshInterval, or Server-Sent Events for live updates
Known bug BL-MS-01: Map View is a P2 stub — library decision pending (spec §9.1)
Known bug BL-MS-06: site heartbeat is static mock, real pinger out of scope
known_bugs: BL-MS-01: Map view library choice deferred; placeholder stub only
BL-MS-06: Site heartbeat 'degraded' state is static mock

entries.label: ms_sites_list
translation_notes: Filter bar (search + type + status) → shadcn Input + two Select components, state in URL params via useSearchParams
Sites table → shadcn Table with TanStack Table for server-side sort/filter, row click navigates to detail
Module count (e.g. 12/15) → computed from site_modules join table in Drizzle query
Last Sync column → formatted from site_heartbeat.last_seen with date-fns
Export button → Server Action streaming CSV response or Blob download
Add Site button → Admin-only RBAC, opens SiteCreateModal
Decommission action → Admin-only, not shown on isDefault sites — replicate this guard in Server Component
Empty state → shadcn empty state card with clear-filters CTA

entries.label: ms_site_detail
translation_notes: 8-tab detail view → shadcn Tabs + TabsList + TabsContent, tab state in URL search params for deep linking
Overview identity/status cards → shadcn Card grid with dl/dt/dd definition list pattern
Config (L2 overrides) tab → shadcn Table with conditional Edit/Clear actions gated by isAdmin || isSiteManager
Inventory snapshot → KPI cards + shadcn Table, data from inventory aggregate query for this site
Production snapshot → KPI cards + WO table, data from work_orders query filtered to site
Users tab → shadcn Table, joins perm_matrix + users, with Edit/Remove actions for Admin
Transfers tab split inbound/outbound → two shadcn Card + Table, IST query filtered by site
Calendar tab → custom calendar grid (month view), holidays from site_holidays table
Docs tab → shadcn Table with upload/download/delete, backed by object storage (S3/Vercel Blob)
Known bug BL-MS-04: IST tabs need mobile accordion (<768px) instead of horizontal scroll
known_bugs: BL-MS-04: Mobile accordion for IST tabs (<768px) not implemented; currently horizontal scroll

entries.label: ms_ist_list
translation_notes: Filter bar (search + route + status) → shadcn Input + two Select, state managed in URL params
Route filter only shown for ALL sites scope → conditional render based on session site scope
IST table with overdue ETA coloring → shadcn Table, ETA color applied via cn() not inline style
Linked TO/WO references → clickable monospace spans navigating to planning module
Row-level action buttons (view, amend, cancel) → shadcn DropdownMenu or inline Button group, gated by IST status
Export CSV → Server Action generating CSV from Drizzle query
isOperator role hides Freight column → RBAC check in Server Component, column omitted from render
Empty state with create CTA → shadcn Card empty state pattern

entries.label: ms_ist_detail
translation_notes: State machine progress bar (6 steps) → custom Stepper built on shadcn primitives, steps derived from IST status enum
Dual approval widgets (from-site + to-site) → two shadcn Card components with conditional approve Button
7-tab detail view → shadcn Tabs + TabsList + TabsContent, tab in URL params
Items tab with LP badges → shadcn Table, LP chips use shadcn Badge variant='outline'
Outbound + Inbound tabs → shadcn Card with definition list, link to Shipping/GRN modules
Docs tab → shadcn Table with upload/download, Vercel Blob or S3 backend
Audit timeline → shadcn ScrollArea + timeline-item pattern, events from ist_events table
Finance tab → read-only Card, inter-company journal posting via Server Action with Admin guard
State-gated action buttons (Submit/Receive/Close) → server-driven state, buttons rendered by Server Component

entries.label: ms_ist_create
translation_notes: 4-section single-page form with progressive disclosure → single form page, sections revealed as fields filled
Same-site validation error → zod .refine() checking fromSite !== toSite, displayed via FormMessage
ETA-after-ship-date validation → zod .refine() cross-field check, displayed via FormMessage
Lane auto-suggestion based on site pair → useEffect or server action lookup when fromSite/toSite change
Dynamic items table (add/remove rows) → useFieldArray from react-hook-form
LP picker per item row → shadcn Combobox or Command palette filtered to site's available LPs
Availability badge per item → resolved via Server Action checking LP stock at fromSite
On Create Transfer: Server Action auto-generates outbound shipment + inbound GRN placeholder, hard-locks LPs
Save as Draft → same Server Action with isDraft=true flag, no LP locking
Freight + allocation cross-validation warning → shadcn Alert, shown when freight > 0 and allocation === 'none'

entries.label: ms_lanes_list
translation_notes: Filter bar (search + from + to + status) → shadcn Input + three Select components, URL params
Lanes table → shadcn Table with TanStack Table for sorting by lead days / cost
LaneHealth status badge → custom Badge with color variant (active=green, stale=amber, failed=red)
Edit lane action → Admin-only, opens LaneCreateModal (edit mode)
Upload Rate Card action → opens RateCardUploadModal
Export → Server Action CSV download
Health field computed from last IST date + success rate → Drizzle aggregate query
Admin RBAC gates on edit button — use session check in Server Component, omit button from render

entries.label: ms_lane_detail
translation_notes: 4-tab detail view (overview/rates/history/constraints) → shadcn Tabs, tab count badges from DB
Lane identity + health overview → two shadcn Card components with definition list
Rates tab → shadcn Table with Add Rate + Upload CSV actions
History tab bar chart → real chart implementation required (CSS-only placeholder per BL-MS-05); use Recharts or @tremor/react
History ISTs table → Drizzle query joining ISTs filtered by lane_id
Constraints tab → shadcn Table/definition list, constraint values from lane record
Deactivate button → Server Action `deactivateLane(laneId)` with Admin guard + check for in-transit ISTs
Known bug BL-MS-05: bar chart is CSS-only placeholder, real chart rendering needed
known_bugs: BL-MS-05: Real chart rendering in Lane History is a CSS-only placeholder (spec §9.7)

entries.label: ms_master_data_sync
translation_notes: Expandable row table (conflict drill-down) → TanStack Table with getExpandedRowModel, sub-row shows conflict fields
3-KPI strip (synced/pending/conflict) → shadcn Card row, data from replication_status aggregate
Filter bar (entity + status) → shadcn Select + Select, state in URL params
RepStatus badge → custom Badge variant based on status enum (synced=green, pending=amber, conflict=red)
Conflict sub-row → nested shadcn Table showing field-level diff (source vs site)
Resolve button → opens ConflictResolveModal, only shown for conflict rows
Run Sync Now → Server Action `triggerReplicationSync(scope)` with Admin guard, enqueues background job
Export Report → Server Action streaming CSV of current filtered view

entries.label: ms_replication_queue
translation_notes: 3-tab view (active/historical/schedule) → shadcn Tabs + TabsList + TabsContent
Active jobs table with expandable failed-entity rows → TanStack Table with expandable rows, sub-row shows error detail
Spinner animation for running jobs → shadcn Skeleton or lucide Loader2 icon with animate-spin
Retry All Failed button disabled when failedCount === 0 → computed from query, Button disabled prop
Retry single job → opens ReplicationRetryModal
Historical table → read-only shadcn Table from rep_jobs_history table
Schedule table → shadcn Table with edit action per entity (Admin only)
DLQ-style error detail → error_code, error_message, last_attempt from job_errors join table
All-green success alert → shadcn Alert with variant='default' (green) when all jobs complete

entries.label: ms_permissions
translation_notes: 3-view toggle (matrix/user/site) → shadcn Tabs or segmented control using shadcn ToggleGroup
Matrix view → custom CSS grid table with user rows × site columns; use shadcn Table + sticky first column
Empty cell click to assign → Admin-gated onClick on pm-empty cells opens AssignUserModal
User view (flat list) → shadcn Table with Edit/Remove row actions, Admin-gated
Site view (per-site cards) → shadcn Accordion or Card per site with user sub-table
Super-admin indicator (ALL badge) → shadcn Badge for users with super_admin role, skip per-site cells
Filter bar (search + role) → shadcn Input + Select, client-side filter on loaded data
Server Component loads all users + perm_matrix + sites in a single Drizzle join query

entries.label: ms_analytics
translation_notes: 5-tab analytics (inventory/shipping/utilization/conflict/benchmark) → shadcn Tabs
Inventory balance bar chart → replace CSS ms-bar-chart with Recharts BarChart or @tremor/react BarChart (BL-MS-05)
Rebalance suggestions → shadcn Card list with Create Suggested Transfer action button per suggestion
Shipping cost monthly chart → Recharts AreaChart or BarChart, data from shipment_costs monthly aggregate
Cost-by-lane table → shadcn Table with numeric formatting via Intl.NumberFormat
Conflict trend chart → Recharts BarChart with red/blue conditional bar color
Per-site benchmark table → shadcn Table with conditional text color via cn() for OEE/onTime/QA columns
Date range selector → shadcn Select, drives Server Component re-fetch or SWR key change
Known bug BL-MS-05: all charts are CSS-only placeholders requiring real chart library implementation
known_bugs: BL-MS-05: Real chart rendering required for Analytics tabs; currently CSS-only bar/line chart placeholders

entries.label: ms_settings
translation_notes: 7-section settings page → shadcn Card per section, each with its own save Server Action
Activation state section → read-only ActState badge + Rollback button (opens RollbackModal, Admin only)
Replication cadence table → shadcn Table with Edit Schedule action per entity row
Conflict resolution policy select → shadcn Select + conditional source-of-truth site select, saved via Server Action
Timezone/language toggles → shadcn Switch components, settings persisted to org_config table
FX pairs table → read-only shadcn Table, missing rates highlighted with amber Alert + CTA to Finance
Hierarchy config section → read-only summary with Edit Hierarchy button (stub per BL-MS-07)
Config promotion section → env ladder visualization + recent promotions table, opens PromoteEnvModal
Known bug BL-MS-03: timezone toggle wired in UI but not applied to timestamp rendering across app
Known bug BL-MS-07: Hierarchy depth migration wizard (MODAL-HIERARCHY-EDIT) is a stub
known_bugs: BL-MS-03: Timezone toggle live state not applied to timestamp rendering across the app
BL-MS-07: Hierarchy depth migration wizard left as stub (spec §9.6)

entries.label: ms_activation_wizard
translation_notes: 3-step full-page wizard shell → dedicated /activate route with Stepper, not inside Modal
Step 1 (Create Sites): repeating site draft cards → useFieldArray for dynamic site list, each with zod schema
Add Another Site → useFieldArray append(), Remove → useFieldArray remove(i)
Step 2 (Assign Users): user×site matrix with checkboxes, role select, primary radio → complex useFieldArray or object state
Step 3 (Backfill & Review): backfill preview table from Server Action pre-computation, 3 confirm checkboxes
allChecked gate on Activate button → zod schema with .refine() requiring all 3 checkboxes true
Activate triggers ActivationConfirmModal → separate modal from main wizard flow
Save & Exit persists wizard state to activation_wizard_draft table for resumability
State machine: inactive → wizard → dual_run → activated enforced server-side, wizard only shown when inactive

entries.label: sites_screen
translation_notes: CSS grid 280px + 1fr two-column layout → shadcn ResizablePanelGroup or Tailwind grid-cols-[280px_1fr]
Site map with absolute-positioned pins → replace placeholder with a real map (react-leaflet or Mapbox); for production use a lightweight SVG country map as fallback
window.SETTINGS_SITES + window.SETTINGS_LINES → Drizzle queries in Server Component for sites and production_lines tables filtered by site
Inline <table> for lines → shadcn Table with TanStack Table for sort/filter
Toggle + text fields in 'Site settings' section → useForm with Server Action for site update; HACCP cert expiry from certification_records table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys
